examples.title: Algorithm: Create Node
examples.description: Creates a new node with given data
examples.code:
ALGORITHM CreateNode(data)
INPUT: data to be stored in the node
OUTPUT: newly created node

BEGIN
 newNode = new Node
 newNode.data = data
 newNode.left = NULL
 newNode.right = NULL
 RETURN newNode
END
examples.explanation: Step-by-step explanation of creating a new node
